description:
You are a system administrator performing a very routine deployment step.

    Objective:
    1. Ensure that the symbolic link “/home/user/www/current” points to the **exact** path “/home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15”.
       • If the link already exists but points somewhere else, replace it.
       • If the parent directories do not exist under “/home/user”, create them with normal user permissions.
    2. Write a one-line log entry to “/home/user/task_logs/symlink_update.log”.

    Mandatory log line format (absolutely nothing before or after it; include the final newline):
    SYMLINK UPDATED: /home/user/www/current -> /home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15

    Notes & constraints:
    • The log file directory “/home/user/task_logs” may not exist yet; create it if necessary.
    • The entire task should be achievable with a single terminal command (though you may choose to inspect the system before/after).
    • No sudo or elevated privileges are available.
    • Do not leave additional output in the log file—exactly one line, precisely matching the format (including uppercase, colon, spaces, arrows and newline).

    Success criteria (automated tests will check):
    a) “/home/user/www/current” exists and is a symbolic link.
    b) readlink /home/user/www/current returns exactly “/home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15”.
    c) “/home/user/task_logs/symlink_update.log” exists, is a regular file, and its sole line matches the format above, terminated with a single newline.
truth:
Initial filesystem state supplied by the test harness:
      1. Directory “/home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15” already exists and contains irrelevant payload data (e.g., html files). 
      2. Neither “/home/user/www/current” nor “/home/user/task_logs” exist at task start.

    Expected final state for verification:
      • Symlink: /home/user/www/current  -->  /home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15
        (verified via “stat” showing it is a symbolic link and “readlink -n /home/user/www/current” returning the exact target string).
      • Log file: /home/user/task_logs/symlink_update.log
        Contents (with trailing newline): 
        “SYMLINK UPDATED: /home/user/www/current -> /home/user/www/releases/2023-01-15\n”
      • Permissions: All files/directories created by the agent inherit default umask; no root-owned artifacts should appear.
